arts.ttl: Why Rangers should have stuck by Gio van Bronckhorst as Antonio Colak addresses struggles
arts.sum: Just months before, he had guided the team to a Europa League final and a Scottish Cup triumph so there was one school of thought that he should have had enough credit in the bank. Addressing his struggles, he explained: "Under Gio, I had the run of games and trust I needed - that's why I was able to score a lot of goals.
